name: OWASP AI Exchange
description: Living open-source resource on AI/ML security threats, controls, and best practices. Continuously updated by the OWASP AI Exchange community. Covers adversarial ML, LLM security, governance, and implementation guidance.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud-hosted AI/ML systems are a primary deployment surface for OWASP AI Exchange topics.
relationToAISecurity: Comprehensive AI security reference. Companion to OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications.

license.notes: OWASP projects are typically CC BY-SA or CC BY. Confirm per-project.

lifecycle.notes: Continuously updated; snapshot dated by retrieval time.

current_extraction.notes: HTML+text content from owaspai.org. Snapshot — re-pull from upstream for current content.
